title: Concept Graph Node
description: Phase D output: one node in the Understand-Anything-derived prerequisite/misconception graph. Consumed by the pedagogy engine to drive sequencing and remediation, not a passive visualization artifact.

conceptId.description: Must match a conceptId in the wiki (wiki-concept-page.schema.json).

prerequisites.description: conceptIds that must be mastered before this one.

misconceptions.description: Misconception ids/slugs the pedagogy engine can detect from checkpoint answers and route remediation for.

supports.description: conceptIds that this concept is a prerequisite for (inverse edge, denormalized for fast lookup).
